texto: On the 11th anniversary of 9/11, it is some consolation that the man most responsible for that terrible morning will not be smiling smugly to himself as satellite TV brings to the leafy boulevards of Abbottabad the somber images of New Yorkers commemorating those who perished in the Twin Towers.
explicacao: Citação de Bobby Ghosh sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “On the 11th anniversary of 9/11, it is some consolation that the man most responsible for that te…” articula sucesso, morning, smiling em registro de sucesso, com relevância para contextos como bom-dia e smiling.

frase_original: On the 11th anniversary of 9/11, it is some consolation that the man most responsible for that terrible morning will not be smiling smugly to himself as satellite TV brings to the leafy boulevards of Abbottabad the somber images of New Yorkers commemorating those who perished in the Twin Towers.
